basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Project Technical Support-III (Psychologist) Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 through Advertisement No. AIIMS/JDH/2026/06/PMR-190. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-III (Psychologist) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master degree in Psychology / Clinical Psychology from recognized University of India
qualification.details: Master degree in Psychology / Clinical Psychology from recognized University of India. Desirable: 2 years relevant experience in psychological assessment / counseling, M. Phil in Clinical Psychology (RCI registered), Experience in disability psychology, neuro-cognitive assessment, counseling of persons with disabilities / caregivers, research in assistive technology.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-III (Psychologist) Job 2026 Not

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Technical Support-III (Psychologist).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-III (Psychologist) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply?
faq.answer: The last date to apply is the Walk-in Interview date, which is 15-06-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Project Technical Support-III (Psychologist) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Psychology or Clinical Psychology from a recognized University in India.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 28,000/- + HRA (as admissible) per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-In Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
